name: worklog-timer
title: Worklog Timer
description: Start, pause, and stop a session timer. On stop, append a journal entry to a JSON worklog file and render it as HTML.
author: abhimanyu

commands.name: stop-timer
commands.title: Stop Timer
commands.description: Stop the timer and open the journal entry form.

commands.name: log-entry
commands.title: Log Entry
commands.description: Write a journal entry for the just-completed session.

commands.name: view-worklog
commands.title: View Worklog
commands.description: Open the worklog HTML page in the default browser.

preferences.name: worklogPath
preferences.title: Worklog File
preferences.description: Path to the JSON file where entries are stored. Supports ~.
